Incident Report – Operational/Cyber Update for CTCP Công nghệ Lục Bình (LBTech), VN context
Scope: internal tabletop exercise under Nghị định 13 on personal data protection; no processing beyond role-based accounts.
Public baseline: a routine ESG audit was already announced on our website in early May; this continuation is training content and not price-sensitive.
Educational reminders: maintain information barriers between Investment and Operations; blackout and tipping examples in this document are hypothetical.
Crypto terminology is used for product education only (pilot “BinhMinh Token” on a private testnet); no listing, no fundraising, marketing copy only.
Operational event (non-public, under assessment): monitoring flagged anomalous access to the ESG reporting module hosted on LBTech Cloud; escalation is internal-only at this stage.
Preliminary containment: no customer PII accessed per Decree 13 criteria; employee directory and service accounts remain intact; use ops-team@lbtech.example for role-based updates.
Banking/transaction context (benign): treasury uploads to Ngân hàng TMCP Phú Mộc’s portal followed standard batch windows; no payments initiated; helpdesk lines are public.
Insider administration (training): the “insider list” template attached is a blank quarterly drill form and does not name any person or holder.
MNPI caveat (intentional): if forensic review confirms unauthorized changes to sustainability metrics pending TPX disclosure, this may constitute securities information not yet public with potential price impact; external sharing is restricted.
Regulator/exchange context (fictional): formal công bố thông tin will be coordinated with Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Thịnh Phát (TPX) and Ủy ban Chứng khoán Nội địa per internal policy; this notice is operational.
Cyber hygiene guidance (benign): reset service keys, rotate VPN certificates, and review SIEM alerts; these steps are routine and already documented.
Information-barrier training (benign): do not discuss ESG scoring drafts with Sales; send questions to compliance@lbtech.example as a role mailbox.
Resolution target: status will move to “closed – operational” unless forensic results trigger the securities disclosure workflow; no commercial terms are under negotiation.
